name: k6-spike-test
description: K6 Load Testing with Infinite Loop

scripts.postinstall: curl -L https://github.com/grafana/k6/releases/download/v0.50.0/k6-v0.50.0-linux-amd64.tar.gz -o k6.tar.gz && tar -xzf k6.tar.gz && mv k6-v0.50.0-linux-amd64/k6 ./k6-bin && rm -rf k6.tar.gz k6-v0.50.0-linux-amd64
